nodes.label: WikiController
nodes.rationale: Single-flight guard for operations: holds AbortController in this.current; rejects new dispatch if isBusy(); orchestrates AgentRunner, DomainStore, view updates, history, and graphCache invalidation

nodes.label: WikiController cache invalidation on mutating ops
nodes.norm_label: wikicontroller cache invalidation on mutating ops

nodes.label: CallSite (type: init.bootstrap | init.delta | lint.patch | lint-chat.fix | query.seeds)
nodes.norm_label: callsite (type: init.bootstrap | init.delta | lint.patch | lint-chat.fix | query.seeds)

nodes.label: Structured retry loop: emit structural_error RunEvent on parse/schema fail, retry with feedback injection
nodes.norm_label: structured retry loop: emit structural_error runevent on parse/schema fail, retry with feedback injection

nodes.label: History limit 20: tradeoff between UX and settings.json size; excess slows Obsidian save
nodes.norm_label: history limit 20: tradeoff between ux and settings.json size; excess slows obsidian save

nodes.label: Читает JSONL-лог dev-режима, возвращает dict operation → list[entry].     Отфиль
nodes.norm_label: читает jsonl-лог dev-режима, возвращает dict operation → list[entry].     отфиль

nodes.label: DSPy-совместимый LM через claude CLI. Не требует API-ключа.
nodes.norm_label: dspy-совместимыи lm через claude cli. не требует api-ключа.

nodes.label: Создаёт LM-объект по DSPY_BACKEND из env. Вызывается после load_dotenv().
nodes.norm_label: создает lm-объект по dspy_backend из env. вызывается после load_dotenv().

nodes.label: wiki_* frontmatter fields preserved on format apply — programmatically managed, must not be lost during LLM reformatting
nodes.norm_label: wiki_* frontmatter fields preserved on format apply — programmatically managed, must not be lost during llm reformatting

nodes.label: Community Plugin Submission Process
nodes.rationale: Plugins are pulled by Obsidian reading community-plugins.json; manifest.json determines latest version; actual files fetched from GitHub releases tagged to match manifest version. This ensures reproducibility and version compatibility checking via versions.json.

nodes.label: Dynalist, Inc. (Obsidian)
nodes.rationale: Legal entity managing Obsidian. Holds copyright license grants from contributors via CLA. Not open source but accepts community plugins and themes.

nodes.label: CLA Copyright License Grant
nodes.rationale: Perpetual, worldwide, non-exclusive, royalty-free, irrevocable copyright license. Contributors retain ownership of their work but grant Obsidian right to reproduce, prepare derivatives, display, perform, sublicense, and distribute contributions.

nodes.label: CLA Patent License Grant
nodes.rationale: Perpetual, worldwide, non-exclusive, royalty-free patent license for patent claims that are necessarily infringed by the contribution alone or in combination with the work. Revocable only if patent litigation is initiated.

nodes.label: {{placeholder}} template syntax
nodes.rationale: Templates use {{placeholder}} syntax so that restore_placeholders() can ensure named slots survive MIPROv2 rewriting, preserving prompt structure through optimization.

nodes.label: DSPy MIPROv2: automated prompt optimization via Optuna
nodes.norm_label: dspy miprov2: automated prompt optimization via optuna

nodes.label: ClaudeCodeLM: DSPy-compatible adapter for Claude CLI
nodes.norm_label: claudecodelm: dspy-compatible adapter for claude cli

nodes.label: Obsidian Graph View UI — Light Theme Screenshot
nodes.rationale: Shows Obsidian October 2021 event page alongside the Graph View panel in light mode. Left sidebar shows file tree (Obsidian Hub), center panel shows an interactive force-directed knowledge graph with node clusters and color-coded groups, right panel shows the October 2021 event article. Demonstrates Obsidian's core graph visualization feature and community engagement via official events.
nodes.norm_label: obsidian graph view ui — light theme screenshot

nodes.label: Obsidian Graph View
nodes.rationale: Force-directed interactive graph visualization panel built into Obsidian. Supports grouping nodes by color, filtering, and showing forces between linked notes. Core UX feature visible in both light and dark screenshots.

nodes.label: Obsidian Graph View UI — Dark Theme Screenshot
nodes.rationale: Same Obsidian October 2021 event page layout in dark mode. Confirms plugin/theme dark mode support requirement. Graph nodes appear as bright dots on dark background with the same force-directed layout. Shows Obsidian's dual light/dark theme capability that community themes must support.
nodes.norm_label: obsidian graph view ui — dark theme screenshot

nodes.label: WikiController
nodes.rationale: Single-flight guard pattern: controller.ts rejects parallel runs via this._running to prevent concurrent stdout stream corruption. Also validates cwd/iclaudePath before dispatch.

nodes.label: AgentRunner
nodes.rationale: Routes operations to typed phases, provides dev-log and evaluator hooks. Decouples routing from execution.

nodes.label: ClaudeCliClient
nodes.rationale: Spawns iclaude.sh with stdio:[ignore,pipe,pipe]. Uses OpenAI-compatible LlmClient interface. Flags must be passed via -- separator because iclaude.sh reserves -p/--proxy for its own use.

nodes.label: parseStreamLine
nodes.rationale: Parses one stdout JSON line into a RunEvent. Non-JSON lines (iclaude banners) are silently ignored.

nodes.label: LlmWikiView
nodes.rationale: Obsidian ItemView that renders steps, metrics, and history live in the sidebar panel via onEvent().

nodes.label: Settings / autodetectCwd
nodes.rationale: autodetectCwd walks up to 6 directory levels to find the workspace root. historyLimit defaults to 20 as a compromise between UX and settings.json size.

nodes.label: TypeScript Types (WikiOperation, RunEvent, WikiDomain)
nodes.rationale: WikiDomain union type on line 8 is the single source of truth for domains. All other places derive from it; only this type needs updating when a domain is added.

nodes.label: GraphCache
nodes.rationale: In-memory, per-domain, hash-keyed cache. Invalidated by controller after writes. Used by query and lint phases.

nodes.label: selectSeeds
nodes.rationale: Jaccard similarity on pageId tokens plus first 200 characters of content to select seed pages for query.

nodes.label: Stream-JSON Protocol (stdout iclaude)
nodes.rationale: Each stdout line is one JSON object: system/assistant/user/result types. Non-JSON lines ignored. stdin is closed (ignore).

nodes.label: Single-Flight Guard
nodes.rationale: Only one operation at a time; concurrent attempts receive an Obsidian Notice. Enforced via this._running in controller.ts to protect stdout stream integrity.

nodes.label: Patch Versioning Policy
nodes.rationale: Before every build: auto-increment patch in package.json and src/manifest.json. Minor/major bumped manually only.

nodes.label: AI Wiki plugin overview
nodes.rationale: Offline-first LLM knowledge wiki for Obsidian; dual backends (Ollama/OpenAI + Claude Agent); operations: Ingest, Query, Lint, Fix, Init, Format, Chat; mobile: Query only

nodes.label: Ingest Operation
nodes.rationale: Parses a note, extracts entities (people, technologies, processes, terms), creates and updates wiki pages. Desktop-only.

nodes.label: Query Operation
nodes.rationale: Answers a question against the knowledge base. Optionally saves answer as new page with WikiLinks. Works on mobile.

nodes.label: Lint Operation
nodes.rationale: Checks wiki-domain quality, finds incomplete and outdated pages. Desktop-only.

nodes.label: Init Operation
nodes.rationale: Initializes a new domain from scratch: folder structure, _schema.md, _index.md. Desktop-only.

nodes.label: Format Operation
nodes.rationale: Analyzes open markdown page outside wiki domains, proposes formatting edits (frontmatter, headings, tables, mermaid, image captions). Hard invariant: must not add/remove facts or distort meaning.

nodes.label: Chat Operation
nodes.rationale: Interactive chat in sidebar panel. Available after Lint and Query to refine results. Launched from sidebar buttons, not Command Palette.

nodes.label: Native Agent Backend (Ollama/OpenAI-compatible)
nodes.rationale: Offline-first backend using Ollama or any OpenAI-compatible server. Data never leaves the machine. Supports proxy, per-operation models/tokens/temperature.

nodes.label: Claude Agent Backend
nodes.rationale: Uses iclaude.sh/iclaude/claude (Claude Code CLI). On mobile automatically falls back to Native Agent. Supports per-operation model configuration.

nodes.label: Mobile Constraint
nodes.rationale: Only Query works on mobile. Ingest, Lint, Init are desktop-only. Claude Agent backend on mobile auto-falls-back to Native Agent.

nodes.label: Domain Map (_domain.json)
nodes.rationale: Stored at !Wiki/_domain.json inside the vault. Syncs normally with notes. Maps domain IDs to source/wiki folder pairs.

nodes.label: local.json (machine-specific config)
nodes.rationale: Stores machine-specific path to iclaude.sh. Must be excluded from sync (Obsidian Sync/git/Syncthing) to avoid path conflicts across machines.

nodes.label: Graph Settings (BFS depth, hub threshold)
nodes.rationale: graphDepth controls BFS hops from seed pages in Query (0=seeds only, max sensible 3). hubThreshold flags pages with more outgoing links than threshold as hubs during Lint.

nodes.label: Domain Map Entry Schema
nodes.rationale: LLM is asked to generate a domain map entry JSON with id, name, wiki_folder, source_paths, entity_types (type, description, extraction_cues, min_mentions_for_page, wiki_subfolder), language_notes. reasoning field is included first for chain-of-thought.

nodes.label: Entity Types (Init)
nodes.rationale: Each entity type has: type (id, immutable), description, extraction_cues, min_mentions_for_page, wiki_subfolder. Used to guide ingest entity extraction.

nodes.label: Incremental Entity Type Update
nodes.rationale: Given one source file and current entity_types JSON, LLM adds new types or refines existing ones. The type field (id) must not be changed. Returns only entity_types and optional language_notes; no other fields. reasoning field first.

nodes.label: Mobile Guard — ingest/lint/init blocked on mobile, query allowed
nodes.norm_label: mobile guard — ingest/lint/init blocked on mobile, query allowed

nodes.label: format-migration.test.ts — settings migration for format operation
nodes.norm_label: format-migration.test.ts — settings migration for format operation

nodes.label: Format Preview Flow — temp file in !Temp/, apply/cancel/refine cycle
nodes.norm_label: format preview flow — temp file in !temp/, apply/cancel/refine cycle

nodes.label: DomainStore auto-migration of !Wiki/ prefix on load
nodes.norm_label: domainstore auto-migration of !wiki/ prefix on load

nodes.label: domain.test.js — JS duplicate of validateDomainId tests
nodes.norm_label: domain.test.js — js duplicate of validatedomainid tests

nodes.label: MIPROv2 prompt optimization pattern
nodes.rationale: Uses DSPy MIPROv2 with auto=light and no bootstrapped/labeled demos to perform lightweight prompt optimization; post-optimization placeholder restoration ensures template variables survive rewriting.

nodes.label: runInit thinking model regression tests
nodes.rationale: Tests regression for thinking-model output: parseStructured() must strip <think> tags before JSON parsing, otherwise greedy regex picks up wrong JSON fragment inside think block

nodes.label: ClaudeCodeLM
nodes.rationale: DSPy-compatible LM adapter that calls claude CLI subprocess; no API key required; parses last JSON object from stdout; requires -- separator before claude flags

nodes.label: make_lm factory
nodes.rationale: Factory function selecting LM backend via DSPY_BACKEND env var; supports ollama, ollama-openai, claude-code

nodes.label: ShellConsentModal
nodes.rationale: First-run consent modal for shell execution of claude CLI; user must explicitly confirm before any spawn occurs; shellConsentGiven flag stored in settings

nodes.label: _pendingFormat state
nodes.rationale: Holds originalPath, tempPath and chat history for multi-turn format preview flow; cleared on apply/cancel

nodes.label: migrateDomainWikiFolder()
nodes.rationale: Strips legacy !Wiki/ prefix from domain.wiki_folder; called during migration path to normalize old-format LLM-returned paths

nodes.label: migrateToLocalV1()
nodes.rationale: Migrates sensitive apiKey and backend config from synced data.json to local.json; scrubs apiKey from synced data after migration

nodes.label: LlmWikiPlugin.loadSettings()
nodes.rationale: Merges loaded data with DEFAULT_SETTINGS; handles schema v2 (systemPrompt), v3 (maxTokens migration), legacy claude-code backend rename, mobile backend overrides, and format.maxTokens 16384→32768 migration

nodes.label: i18n()
nodes.rationale: Returns locale-specific UI strings based on moment.locale(); falls back to English if locale not found; supports ru, es, en

nodes.label: ClaudeCliClient
nodes.rationale: Spawns iclaude.sh subprocess; stdio: ignore/pipe/pipe; SIGTERM grace 3000ms then SIGKILL; passes flags after -- separator; handles large payload via tmpFile; captures lastSessionId from system init line

nodes.label: validateIclaudePath()
nodes.rationale: Security validation: path must be non-empty, absolute, and contain no .. traversal segments

nodes.label: LARGE_THRESHOLD (262144 bytes)
nodes.rationale: Payloads exceeding 262144 bytes are written to tmpFile and passed via --append-system-prompt-file / --system-prompt-file flags instead of inline args

nodes.label: Shell Execution Security model
nodes.rationale: Path validated to be absolute with no traversal before each spawn; first-run consent modal required; shellConsentGiven flag in data.json; revocable by user

nodes.label: ingest.md prompt
nodes.rationale: Instructs LLM to extract entities from source and CREATE/UPDATE/SKIP wiki pages; returns JSON array with path, content, annotation; frontmatter mandatory (wiki_sources, wiki_updated, wiki_status, wiki_keywords)

nodes.label: lint.md prompt
nodes.rationale: Instructs LLM to review wiki-base quality (duplicates, gaps, stale content, broken links) and return fixed pages as JSON array with path, content, annotation

nodes.label: init.md prompt (bootstrap)
nodes.rationale: Instructs LLM to generate DomainEntry JSON for domain-map.json; includes reasoning field first; specifies wiki_folder as vaults/vault_name/!Wiki/domain_id (normalized by init.ts)

nodes.label: init-incremental.md prompt (delta)
nodes.rationale: Instructs LLM to update entity_types list based on a single new source file; returns EntityTypesDelta JSON; add/refine types, never rename type field; reasoning field required first

nodes.label: Single-flight guard pattern
nodes.rationale: Only one operation may run at a time; parallel spawns would corrupt stdout stream; enforced via this.current AbortController; new dispatch rejected with Notice if already busy

nodes.label: Per-file pipeline (init)
nodes.rationale: For each source file: bootstrap (file 0) or incremental delta (files 1+) LLM call → ingest LLM call → write articles. Articles for file N written before LLM called for file N+1. Enables resume from interrupted position via analyzed_sources.

nodes.label: analyzed_sources_v2 resume flag
nodes.rationale: Flag indicating analyzed_sources uses per-file-pipeline format (v2); domains with analyzed_sources_v2=true skip already-processed files on re-init without --force

nodes.label: wiki_folder normalization
nodes.rationale: LLM may return wiki_folder as vaults/VaultName/!Wiki/domain or !Wiki/domain prefix; init.ts and migrateDomainWikiFolder() strip those prefixes to store only the domain subfolder name

nodes.label: shellConsentGiven consent flow
nodes.rationale: ShellConsentModal shown on first layout-ready if backend=claude-agent and shellConsentGiven=false; all dispatch and dispatchChat paths check shellConsentGiven before proceeding

nodes.label: Effort level (thinking budget)
nodes.rationale: ClaudeOperationConfig.effort controls --effort flag passed to iclaude.sh; values: low, medium, high, xhigh, max; empty = no thinking; per-op override or global fallback

nodes.label: DSPy MIPROv2 prompt optimizer
nodes.rationale: Reads accumulated JSONL dev log, optimizes system prompts for llm-wiki operations using MIPROv2 with auto=light; ClaudeCodeLM adapter bridges DSPy to claude CLI

nodes.label: <think> tag stripping in parseStructured()
nodes.rationale: Thinking models wrap output in <think>...</think> tags; greedy JSON regex picks up wrong JSON inside think block; parseStructured() must strip <think> before extracting JSON

nodes.label: wipeDomainFolder (--force reinit)
nodes.rationale: Removes all files under !Wiki/<folder>/ recursively; does not touch files outside that path; skips files that fail to remove and continues; returns list of removed files

nodes.label: Multilingual UI (i18n)
nodes.rationale: moment.locale() selects language at runtime; en is default fallback; ru and es fully translated; all user-facing strings routed through i18n() to avoid hardcoded strings
